extract: Kiloude City (Japanese: キナンシティ Kinan City) is a city located in the southern part of the Kalos region and is only accessible after the TMV Pass is obtained from Professor Sycamore in Lumiose Station after entering the Hall of Fame. After participating in a battle in the Battle Maison, Calem/Serena will battle the player daily in the north of the city. It can frequently be found raining here.
